zh.lifeSummary: Rohese de Boulogne是William de Boulogne和Blanche de Tingry的女兒，於大約1090年出生在英國肯特托布利其。她與Richard de Lucy結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1136年之後在英國英格蘭倫敦，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦紐哈姆坎寧 堂霍利 特利尼迪 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rohese
meanings: An old British name. It is found Latinised Rhesus, and is probably derived from the Greek word for Mars, the god of war.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Rohese de Boulogne was born about 1090, in Tonbridge, Kent, England as the daughter of William de Boulogne and Blanche de Tingry. She married Richard de Lucy. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 1136, in London, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Holy Trinity Church, Canning Town, Newham, London, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Rohese de Boulogneは約1090年にイギリスケントトンブリッジでWilliam de BoulogneとBlanche de Tingryの娘として生まれた。Richard de Lucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1136年以後にイギリスイギリスロンドンで死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンニューハムカニング トウンホーリー トリニトイ チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Holy Trinity Church, Canning Town, Newha: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 뉴함 캔잉 타운 홀이 트리니티 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Rohese de Boulogne(은)는 대략 1090년 영국 켄트 토브리지에서 William de Boulogne(와)과 Blanche de Tingry의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Richard de Lucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1136년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 뉴함 캔잉 타운 홀이 트리니티 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Rohese de Boulogne nasceu aproximadamente 1090, em Tonbridge, Kent, Inglaterra filha de William de Boulogne e Blanche de Tingry. Ela casou-se com Richard de Lucy. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1136, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Holy Trinity Church, Canning Town, Newham, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Holy Trinity Church, Canning Town, Newha: холи тринити чурч, каннинг тоун, нюхам, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Rohese de Boulogne родилась около 1090 г. в местности тонбридж, кэнт, Англия. Её родителей звали William de Boulogne и Blanche de Tingry. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Lucy. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1136 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности холи тринити чурч, каннинг тоун, нюхам, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
